proposed.name: constructor_dominance
proposed.description: Ratio of constructor points to field average

proposed.name: quali_trend
proposed.description: Slope of qualifying gap over last 5 races (negative = improving)
proposed.hypothesis: Drivers with improving qualifying trend should finish higher

proposed.name: home_advantage
proposed.description: Difference between overall form and circuit-specific form
proposed.hypothesis: Positive value = driver performs better at this circuit than average

proposed.name: grid_volatility
proposed.description: Std dev of grid position over last 5 races
proposed.hypothesis: More consistent qualifiers should finish higher

proposed.name: points_acceleration
proposed.description: Second derivative of cumulative points — acceleration of form
proposed.hypothesis: Drivers gaining momentum faster should be more competitive
